page_metadata.biotools__summary: Efficient and effective method for constructing phylogenetic networks. It takes as input a set of rooted phylogenetic trees given in Newick format (inputfile shows an example of input data).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Efficient and effective method for constructing phylogenetic networks. It takes as input a set of rooted phylogenetic trees given in Newick format (inputfile shows an example of input data).
